title: Cross-asset regime labelers + dossiers (Phase 5.1)
source: [phase5/SPIKE_REPORT.md](phase5/SPIKE_REPORT.md) §"What's NOT in this spike" — every PROCEED proposal pre-registers a cross-asset falsification cohort (BULLQ-002 → SPX/DXY; BEARQ-002 → XAG+HG; BEARS-001 → SPX/DXY/BTCUSD/TLT) but no per-asset infrastructure exists.
why: Cross-asset replication is the load-bearing falsifier for any proposal that survives the within-asset audit. Currently the only regime-labeler is `pipeline.regimes` parameterized for XAUUSD; dossiers exist only at `signals/regime_stats/XAUUSD/`. Without per-asset regime infrastructure, no within-asset PROCEED can be elevated to PROMOTE.
value_rationale: M (downgraded from H in 2026-05-27 recalibration — gates *future* cross-asset PROMOTE, but no Loop A within-XAU PROCEED has cleared the audit yet, so cross-asset falsification has nothing to validate. Reopen-trigger: ≥1 Loop A `audit_passed` survivor on XAU)
scope: parameterize `pipeline.regimes` per asset (vol/trend thresholds may need re-tuning for non-XAU instruments); build dossiers for XAGUSD, BTCUSD, SPX, DXY, TLT, USDJPY, HG via [phase5/regime_stats.py](phase5/regime_stats.py); validate `sample_sufficient` per regime per asset (BEAR_STRESSED was already tagged insufficient on XAU; may collapse further on smaller-history assets).
